query: 冷藏室温度太高 fridge temperature 4°C

candidates.text_excerpt: 冷藏室温度 冷藏室温度太高时，先确认门封闭合，再把 fridge temperature setting 调到 4°C。避免把热食直接放入冷藏室，等待六小时后复查温度。
Cooling Mode Use cooling mode when the room is hot. Set the AC mode to cool, choose 24°C, close windows, and wait ten minutes before lowering the temperature again.
Rinse Aid If dishes remain wet, refill rinse aid and choose the extra dry option.
Filter Cleaning Clean the air conditioner filter every two weeks. Turn power off, slide out the filter, rinse dust from the mesh, dry fully, then reinstall before cooling mode.
F07 Sensor Fault F07 means the room sensor wire is loose on model DHQE800BW2. Turn power off, reseat the small white connector, and restart after one minute.
F2 Water Leak Recovery Fault code F2 means leak protection stopped the dishwasher. Turn off water, dry the base tray, inspect the inlet hose, then restart after the leak recovery check.
A-10 Child Lock A-10 appears when 童锁 is active on model HR6FDFF701SW. Hold Temp and Spin together for three seconds until the child lock icon turns off.
Drum Clean Maintenance Run drum clean every month with the washer empty. Wipe the door gasket and detergent drawer so odor and lint do not return.
E-21 Pump Detail E-21 is shown when the 排水泵 or filter drawer is blocked by lint. Open the lower cover, empty residual water, unlock the pump cap, and remove coins before starting drain only.
Compressor Noise Low humming or clicking noise is normal after the compressor starts. If refrigerator noise becomes loud, level the cabinet feet and keep bottles away from the rear wall.
睡眠模式 睡眠模式会逐步调高温度并降低风速，适合夜间使用。
AP12 Air Conditioner Manual
E21 Drain Fault Error code E21 means the washer cannot drain. Pause the cycle, clean the pump filter, straighten the drain hose, then run spin only to confirm water leaves the drum.
WM8 Washer Manual
Filter And Spray Arm Cleaning For dishwasher cleaning, remove the lower filter, rinse food soil, and rotate the spray arm to clear blocked holes. Refit both parts before starting a cycle.
